title: Relic Toast
description:
Relic Toast shows a configurable in-game popup whenever you obtain a relic in Slay the Spire 2.

It is especially useful for streamers and video creators: viewers can immediately see which relic was picked up and what it does, without needing to recognize the icon.

Features:
- Uses the game's relic art and localized relic text
- Configurable position, offsets, scale, duration, and animations
- Includes a test toast in the mod settings
- Local-only visual mod

Requires BaseLib.

Source code:
https://github.com/brunodemarchi/sts2-relic-toast

This mod is provided as-is. Active maintenance is not guaranteed, but the source is public so players can inspect it, fork it, or submit fixes.

Multiplayer note: I do not play multiplayer, so Relic Toast has not been tested in multiplayer yet.
changeNote: Added source code and maintenance note to the Workshop description.
